property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Wolfram Research\WolframScript\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\GNU Arm Embedded Toolchain\10 2021.10\bin;C:\Users\moner\.cargo\bin;C:\Users\moner\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\moner\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\moner\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\moner\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\moner\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;.

testcase.name: oneProcess
testcase.system-out: ======Starting a scheduler of one process===== Final Report: [Process name= Process1; It wanted to execute at time 0.003 asking for a cpuBurst of 1.0 seconds; It had to wait until 0.003 for being scheduled to the CPU; It executed and left the CPU at 1.009. ] Process names:Process1/Process1arrival times:0.003/0.002 end times: 1.009/1.002 (difference 0.006999999999999895) scheduledTime:0.003/0.002

testcase.name: testExampleInProblemStatement
testcase.system-out: ======Starting the eight processes in two batches with assertions===== Final Report: : [Process name= P4; It wanted to execute at time 3.032 asking for a cpuBurst of 2.0 seconds; It had to wait until 3.032 for being scheduled to the CPU; It executed and left the CPU at 5.043. , Process name= P1; It wanted to execute at time 0.0 asking for a cpuBurst of 5.0 seconds; It had to wait until 0.025 for being scheduled to the CPU; It executed and left the CPU at 7.036. , Process name= P3; It wanted to execute at time 2.023 asking for a cpuBurst of 1.0 seconds; It had to wait until 7.036 for being scheduled to the CPU; It executed and left the CPU at 8.04. , Process name= P2; It wanted to execute at time 1.007 asking for a cpuBurst of 2.0 seconds; It had to wait until 8.04 for being scheduled to the CPU; It executed and left the CPU at 10.042. ] Mock: [Process name= P4; It wanted to execute at time 3.0 asking for a cpuBurst of 2.0 seconds; It had to wait until 3.0 for being scheduled to the CPU; It executed and left the CPU at 5.0. , Process name= P1; It wanted to execute at time 0.0 asking for a cpuBurst of 5.0 seconds; It had to wait until 0.0 for being scheduled to the CPU; It executed and left the CPU at 7.0. , Process name= P3; It wanted to execute at time 2.0 asking for a cpuBurst of 1.0 seconds; It had to wait until 7.0 for being scheduled to the CPU; It executed and left the CPU at 8.0. , Process name= P2; It wanted to execute at time 1.0 asking for a cpuBurst of 2.0 seconds; It had to wait until 8.0 for being scheduled to the CPU; It executed and left the CPU at 10.0. ] Process names:P4/P4arrival times:3.032/3.0 end times: 5.043/5.0 (difference 0.04300000000000015) scheduledTime:3.032/3.0 Process names:P1/P1arrival times:0.0/0.0 end times: 7.036/7.0 (difference 0.03599999999999959) scheduledTime:0.025/0.0 Process names:P3/P3arrival times:2.023/2.0 end times: 8.04/8.0 (difference 0.03999999999999915) scheduledTime:7.036/7.0 Process names:P2/P2arrival times:1.007/1.0 end times: 10.042/10.0 (difference 0.041999999999999815) scheduledTime:8.04/8.0
